Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “Who I Am & What I Do” tool. This is a very important tool with the main focus of letting
your attendees introduce themselves to the group but in a detailed and orderly fashion. This will allow everyone in the room to know what their fellow
attendees love to do and why they are in this group to begin with. The more people feel a sense of connection, the better the group will perform.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down your name.
Write down what you love to do.
Write down the best thing about your business.
Write down why you are in the group or mastermind.
Finish the “Who I Am & What I Do tool” with Dean completely and understand its simplicity yet high importance!
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
